ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-03-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Nov-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Donna Quan for Douglass De Loy.

Ms. Quan stated that she is not aware of any objections/there are no objections and verified that disclaimers have come in from everyone who is able to disclaim, that none of the disclaiming people have children, that the two adult children of one of the disclaimers have disclaimed and that neither of them have any children. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
